Solution 09

Email Security

Advanced email security solutions protecting against phishing, business email compromise, ransomware delivery, and outbound data loss -- keeping your inbox clean and your data safe.

Key Vendors & Brands

Click any brand to see product details

PR
Progist Email Security Gateway
＋ View details
PR

Progist

Email Security Gateway

Progist provides a comprehensive email security gateway with anti-spam, anti-phishing, sandboxing, and email continuity -- designed for Indian enterprises with local support.

Key Features

  • Multi-layer anti-spam and anti-phishing
  • Attachment sandboxing
  • Email continuity during outages
  • Email archiving and e-discovery
  • India-based support and data centres

Use Cases

  • ✓ Block 99%+ of spam and phishing before reaching user inboxes
  • ✓ Ensure email continuity when your mail server goes down
  • ✓ Archive all emails for regulatory compliance
Why CrewTEC recommends Progist

Progist delivers enterprise email security with Indian data residency and local support. CrewTEC is a Progist partner with deployments across mid-market Indian enterprises.

Interested in Progist? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Progist →
CL
Cloudflare Email Security
＋ View details
CL

Cloudflare

Email Security

Cloudflare Area 1 Email Security uses machine learning to detect and block phishing, BEC, and malware -- with pre-delivery scanning that stops threats before they reach inboxes.

Key Features

  • Pre-delivery phishing and BEC detection
  • Business email compromise (BEC) protection
  • Retro-scanning of delivered emails
  • API-based integration with Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace
  • No MX record change required for API mode

Use Cases

  • ✓ Stop CEO fraud and wire transfer scams using AI-based BEC detection
  • ✓ Scan historical emails retroactively for hidden threats
  • ✓ Add email protection without changing MX records
Why CrewTEC recommends Cloudflare

Cloudflare Area 1 is among the highest-rated email security solutions. CrewTEC deploys it as a powerful layer on top of Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace.

Interested in Cloudflare? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Cloudflare →
FO
Forcepoint Email DLP & Security
＋ View details
FO

Forcepoint

Email DLP & Security

Forcepoint Email Security combines inbound threat protection with outbound DLP -- ensuring sensitive data never leaves the organisation via email while blocking inbound threats.

Key Features

  • Inbound phishing and malware protection
  • Outbound email DLP with 1700+ classifiers
  • Email encryption for sensitive communications
  • Image analysis with OCR for data in images
  • Compliance enforcement for regulated industries

Use Cases

  • ✓ Prevent employees from emailing sensitive customer data externally
  • ✓ Automatically encrypt emails containing regulated data
  • ✓ Block outbound emails containing credit card numbers or PII
Why CrewTEC recommends Forcepoint

Forcepoint uniquely combines inbound security and outbound DLP in one email platform. CrewTEC deploys it for organisations that need both threat protection and data governance in email.

Interested in Forcepoint? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Forcepoint →
CH
Check Point Harmony Email
＋ View details
CH

Check Point

Harmony Email

Check Point Harmony Email & Collaboration protects Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, and Slack from phishing, malware, and data leakage using AI-powered inline protection.

Key Features

  • AI-based phishing detection with 0-click remediation
  • Anti-malware for attachments with full emulation
  • Data loss prevention for email and collaboration apps
  • Account takeover protection
  • Coverage for Teams, Slack, OneDrive, and SharePoint

Use Cases

  • ✓ Remove phishing emails from all inboxes with one click after detection
  • ✓ Protect Microsoft Teams and Slack from malicious file sharing
  • ✓ Detect compromised email accounts through anomalous sending behaviour
Why CrewTEC recommends Check Point

Harmony Email's AI catches threats that Microsoft Defender misses. CrewTEC deploys Harmony Email as a powerful add-on for Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace environments.

Interested in Check Point? Talk to our specialists for a free consultation.

Get a Quote for Check Point →

What We Help You Achieve

  • ✓ Block phishing, spear-phishing, and CEO fraud attacks
  • ✓ Prevent ransomware delivery via malicious email attachments
  • ✓ Detect and block business email compromise (BEC) attempts
  • ✓ Prevent sensitive data exfiltration via outbound email
  • ✓ Ensure email continuity during outages

Key Features

AI-powered phishing and BEC detection

Sandboxing for malicious attachment analysis

Outbound DLP for sensitive data in email

DMARC, DKIM, and SPF enforcement

Email continuity and archiving
